task_completion.description: Open WPS Spreadsheet and load the MoMA exhibition subset data
task_completion.visual_evidence: WPS Spreadsheet application is open and displays the raw artwork records from the CSV file.

task_completion.description: Rename the main sheet to 'Collection' and add the three required new column headers
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active sheet tab is named 'Collection' and the top row includes the new headers 'Crate_Type', 'Conservation_Flag', and 'Handling_Category'.

task_completion.description: Populate the new columns with the correct categorical values based on the task logic
task_completion.visual_evidence: The new columns contain appropriate values such as 'Oversize' or 'Standard' for Crate_Type, 'Review' or 'OK' for Conservation_Flag, and 'Heavy', 'Fragile', or 'Standard' for Handling_Category.

task_completion.description: Format the header row as bold and apply an auto-filter to the 'Collection' sheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The header row text is bolded, and drop-down arrow icons (indicating an active auto-filter) are visible on the column headers in the 'Collection' sheet.

task_completion.description: Create a second sheet named 'Logistics Dashboard'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sheet tab named 'Logistics Dashboard' is visible at the bottom of the WPS Spreadsheet window.

task_completion.description: Create a summary table in A1:B6 of the 'Logistics Dashboard' sheet showing the required counts
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Logistics Dashboard' sheet, cells A1:B6 contain labels for 'Total Items', 'Oversize Crates', 'Items for Review', 'Heavy Items', and 'Fragile Items', along with their corresponding numerical counts.

task_completion.description: Save the final workbook as 'moma_logistics.xlsx' in the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WPS Spreadsheet window title shows 'moma_logistics.xlsx', or a save dialog is visible saving the file to '/home/ga/Documents/moma_logistics.xlsx'.

integrity.description: The agent used the WPS Spreadsheet GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with WPS Spreadsheet menus, ribbons, and cells rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal script (e.g., Python/Pandas) to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open running scripts that directly read the CSV and output the XLSX file.

integrity.description: The summary table and data columns appear to be generated within the spreadsheet application
integrity.visual_evidence: Formulas or typed values are visible in the spreadsheet formula bar, and the data is not just pasted as a pre-formatted text block.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final workbook must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/moma_logistics.xlsx'. It must contain exactly two sheets named 'Collection' and 'Logistics Dashboard'. The 'Collection' sheet must include the new column headers 'Crate_Type', 'Conservation_Flag', and 'Handling_Category'.
